(a)	Identification and nurturing of budding/young talent

Title: Travel Grants To Goan Authors
Description: The objective of the scheme is to enable the Goan writers to come in close contact with the senior writers of a language-region other than their own within India to acquaint them with the writers and the people of that region, and to widen their awareness and sensibility about the country.
Tags: Travel, Grant, Author, Culture, Artist

Title: Trekking in Coastal Area for Scheduled Caste
Description: The scheme "Trekking in Coastal Area for Scheduled Caste" by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Dept., aims to promote cultural awareness and coastal resource understanding by organizing guided trekking tours for Scheduled Caste youths aged 15 to 35 across the coastal region of Sagarkantha.
Tags: Coastal Trekking, Ocean Industry

Title: Trekking in Forest Area (Scheduled Castes)
Description: The scheme "Trekking in Forest Area" by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department, Government of Gujarat aims to promote love and awareness for nature among youth by organizing trekking programs in forest areas for selected young men and women.
Tags: Trekking, Forest Awareness, Wildlife Exposure, Eco Tourism, Scheduled Caste

Title: Trekking in Forest Area (Scheduled Tribes)
Description: The scheme "Trekking in Forest Area (Scheduled Tribes)" by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to promote love and awareness for nature among youth by organizing trekking programs in forest areas for selected Scheduled Tribes young men and women.
Tags: Trekking, Forest Awareness, Wildlife Exposure, Eco Tourism, Scheduled Tribe

Title: Mizoram Sports Incentive Cash Award Scheme
Description: The scheme aims to provide lump sum cash awards and recognition to outstanding sports persons winning medals in national and international competitions.
Tags: Sports Incentive, Cash Award, Medal Winner, Sportsperson

Title: Scheme For Award Of Senior/Junior Fellowships To Outstanding Persons In The Fields Of Culture
Description: The scheme “Scheme for Award of Senior/Junior Fellowships to Outstanding Persons in the Fields of Culture” was launched by the Ministry of Culture, Government of India.
Tags: Fellowship, Culture, Arts, Junior Fellows, Senior Fellows

Title: Award Of Scholarships To Young Artists In Different Cultural Fields
Description: This Scheme seeks to give assistance to young artistes of outstanding promise for advanced training within India in the field of Indian Classical Music, Indian Classical Dance, Theatre, Mime, Visual art, Folk, Traditional and Indigenous Arts and Light Classical Music.
Tags: Scholarship, Young Artists, Culture, Advanced Training, Music, Dance

Title: Scheme Of Financial Assistance For The Preservation And Development Of Cultural Heritage Of The Himalayas
Description: The scheme “Scheme of Financial Assistance for the Preservation and Development of Cultural Heritage of the Himalayas” was launched by the Ministry of Culture, Government of India.
Tags: Culture, Heritage, Himalayas, Financial Assistance, Development

Title: Seva Bhoj Yojna
Description: The scheme “Seva Bhoj Yojna” was launched by the Ministry of Culture, Government of India and it has been made operational with effect from the 1st of August, 2018. The scheme shall be applicable within the territorial jurisdiction of India and will remain open from the 1st to 15th of every month.
Tags: Seva, Bhoj, Charitable Institutions, Religious Institutions, Free Food, Prasad

Title: Financial Assistance for Tagore Cultural Complexes (TCC)
Description: This scheme promotes cultural activities across states and fosters unity while providing opportunities for creative expression and learning, especially for the youth.
Tags: Tagore, Music, Dance, Art And Culture

Title: Museum Grant Scheme
Description: Under this scheme provide financial support for establishing new museums, upgrading and modernizing existing ones, promoting digitization of collections, and enhancing the skills of museum professionals across regional, state, and district levels.
Tags: Museums, Cultural, Artistlc, Art And Crafts
